meta.title: About Us | Go2Fix.ro
meta.description: Go2Fix is Romania's first home services marketplace. Our mission is to connect clients with verified service providers.

hero.title: Romania's first home services platform
hero.subtitle: We connect clients with verified home service providers, transparently and quickly.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p1: Romania's cleaning sector is largely informal — millions of transactions happen without invoices, guarantees or protection. Go2Fix changes that.
mission.p2: We are building Romania's first digital home services marketplace, where companies are verified, payments are secure, and clients have access to real reviews.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing, no hidden costs. You know exactly what you pay.

quality.title: Verified quality
quality.desc: Every company goes through a rigorous verification process.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We build a community of professionals and satisfied clients.

growth.title: Growth
growth.desc: We help cleaning companies digitise their business.

cta.title: Want to be the first to try us?
cta.subtitle: The platform is launching soon. Sign up and get priority access.
